reports.title: oh-my-codex
reports.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
reports.description_zh: OmX -哦，我的codeX ：您的codex并不孤单。添加挂钩、客服代表团队、HUD等。

reports.title: openscreen
reports.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
reports.description_zh: 免费创建令人惊叹的演示。开源，无订阅，无水印，免费用于商业用途。Screen Studio的替代方案。

reports.title: timesfm
reports.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
reports.description_zh: TimesFM （时间序列基础模型）是由Google Research开发的用于时间序列预测的预训练时间序列基础模型。

reports.title: claude-howto
reports.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
reports.description_zh: 以示例为导向的可视化Claude准则指南--从基本概念到高级客服代表，其中的复制粘贴模板可立即带来价值。

reports.title: google-ai-edge/gallery
reports.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
reports.description_zh: 展示设备上ML/GenAI用例的图库，并允许人们在本地尝试和使用模型。
